warning: Qualitative categories may hide contested thresholds.
mitigation: Document category definitions and affected interpretation.

warning: Outputs outside codomain show the mapping is not valid as specified.
mitigation: Revise codomain or restrict the domain.

warning: A missing input means this is not a total function on the stated domain.
mitigation: Add mapping for every domain element or label as partial.

warning: Score labels may appear objective while encoding design choices.
mitigation: State how labels are defined and validate consequences.

warning: A relation with multiple outputs for one input is not a function.
mitigation: Represent as relation or restrict outputs.
